name: Potency, selectivity, and consequences of nonselectivity of PDE inhibition
summary: Comparative review of PDE inhibitor potency and selectivity, including differences among sildenafil, vardenafil, and tadalafil for PDE1, PDE6, and PDE11 that can affect transfer of adverse-effect and mechanistic assumptions.

access_attempts.result: NCBI E-utilities metadata accessed and web-search abstract snippet reviewed; browser access to PubMed was blocked by bot check.
access_attempts.notes: Used abstract-level statements that sildenafil, vardenafil, and tadalafil are selective PDE5 inhibitors with different non-PDE5 selectivity profiles, including tadalafil PDE11 and sildenafil/vardenafil PDE6 considerations.
